---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new component, style, or token addition
title: "feat(<scope>): "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem description

What problem are you trying to solve, or what gap does this fill in the library?

## Proposed solution

Describe the component, style, or token you'd like to see added. Include a rough API sketch if possible.

```swift
// e.g. proposed usage
DFRating(value: $stars, max: 5)
    .dfRatingStyle(.star)
```

## Alternatives considered

What did you consider instead? Why did you rule it out?

## Category

- [ ] Primitive (basic building-block component)
- [ ] Input (form control)
- [ ] Layout (structural wrapper)
- [ ] Overlay (modal, sheet, popover, toast, etc.)
- [ ] Navigation
- [ ] Supplementary
- [ ] Token / theme system change
- [ ] Style variant for an existing component

## Additional context

Links, design references, or prior art that informed this request.
